  "findings": [
    "GFCI protection is missing in required wet, kitchen, and garage locations, creating a severe shock hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize affected circuits if immediate danger exists, or schedule immediate installation of GFCI receptacles or GFCI circuit breakers to protect these locations."
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of GFCI protection in wet areas, kitchens, and garages violates NEC 210.8 requirements for personnel protection, as well as NEC 406.4 requirements for receptacle replacements. This constitutes a critical safety non-compliance in an active, in-service installation.",

    "NEC 406.9"
